name: liaison
description: Bidirectional Discord ↔ GitHub Issues bot. Public multi-tenant bot powered by Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute liaison-db --local --file=migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute liaison-db --local --file=migrations/0002_products.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute liaison-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute liaison-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_products.sql
